title: Mothman A Romance Musical
description: It’s 1943, and the Nazis are winning. Luckily America has one last trick up its sleeve – a super soldier! But uh oh! A moth snuck into the machine? It's mutating! I wonder what the outcome will be? Written by Alex Franklin (As seen on Channel 4/ HBO Max, Gurl Code, 'Deeply affecting and incredibly funny' - The Wee Review [★★★★★]) and Nikola McMurtrie (Sketch Off 2025 3rd Place, Musical Comedy Award and Funny Women finalist) after an evening of electrifying passion. Prepare for the ultimate romantic comedy musical that no one asked for. Mothman!

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
